title: Thoughts and things 2/12/25 (Brotein launch slip + Mom's car totaled)
html:
TL;DR

  • 2/12/25 — Brotein was supposed to launch today; it did not. Yahir reframes pressure as "spotlight" — "we step up and we smile, this is what life has endowed."
  • Mom totaled her car the same day. "She is poor and this will set her back immensely. I must change this…" — early datestamp for the mom house by the river goal motivation as financial-rescue.
  • Yahir frames himself as the chosen one — risk-taker by lucky-temperament. "I trust god, but I trust myself more."
  • Names his aura as "god given eyes to be the eyes for my mom."
  • Closing line: "I will ignite my inner flame so wildly so that it screams and rages till it can't no more." — pure manifesto register.

Notes

Short, raw entry written in the immediate aftermath of two compounding hits in one day — the Brotein launch-slip (the technical disappointment) and the totaled-car news (the real disappointment). The doc's filename is mistitled (2122024, but modified = 2025-02-12 — title is a year-typo; this is 2025, not 2024).

The two-disappointments → manifesto-conversion pattern is the same shape as the Shanghai phone loss doc — adversity arrives, Yahir spends one paragraph naming it, then immediately writes himself a pep-talk in manifesto register. "Spotlight, not pressure" is one of the cleaner reframes in the corpus.

The mom-totaled-car moment is the financial-rescue trigger: it's the closest dated origin point in the corpus for why the mom house by the river goal is non-negotiable and why the "$5k/mo by June 2026, $100k/mo by EOY 2026" targets in Memory feel personally weighted rather than abstractly ambitious.

Trust-stack ordering is notable: "I trust god, but I trust myself more" — same chosen one frame that runs through 2024 12 14 departing china and the 2026 thesis. God as backstop, self as primary.

Connections
